ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptographic_keys" (
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptographic key */,
  "key_type" TEXT /* Type of the key (e.g., key, secret) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the key used or generated */,
  "stack_index" INTEGER /* Index in the local stack for the key */,
  "global_index" INTEGER /* Global index for the key to ensure uniqueness across systems */,
  "public_key" TEXT /* Public key material in hexadecimal format */,
  "private_key" TEXT /* Private key material in hexadecimal format */,
  "key_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for key generation (e.g., RSA, Elliptic Curve) */,
  "key_size" INTEGER /* Size of the key in bits */,
  "key_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the key is set to expire */,
  "key_status" TEXT /* Status of the key (e.g., active, inactive, revoked) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the key was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the key was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the key being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, read, update, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who performed the action */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the access was made (e.g., IP address, hostname) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the key (e.g., API, console, CLI) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_access_logs_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_id") REFERENCES cryptographic_keys ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key owner */,
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the key owned */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the key owner */,
  "owner_email" TEXT /* Email address of the key owner */,
  "owner_role" TEXT /* Role of the key owner (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_owners_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_id") REFERENCES cryptographic_keys ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key usage entry */,
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the key being used */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service using the key */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., encryption, decryption) */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the key has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_usage_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_id") REFERENCES cryptographic_keys ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_revocation" (
  "revocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key revocation entry */,
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the key being revoked */,
  "revocation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for key revocation */,
  "revocation_date" TEXT /* Date when the key was revoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_revocation_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_id") REFERENCES cryptographic_keys ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_rotation" (
  "rotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key rotation entry */,
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the key being rotated */,
  "rotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the key was rotated */,
  "new_key_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the new key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_rotation_new_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_key_id") REFERENCES cryptographic_keys ("key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_rotation_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("key_id") REFERENCES cryptographic_keys ("key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
